metadata.title: Moldy - AI Agent Builder
metadata.description: Create, chat with, and schedule AI agents.

login.title: Log in
login.subtitle: Enter your account details.
login.rememberMeTooltip: You currently stay signed in by default.

register.title: Sign up
register.subtitle: Create your Moldy account.
register.name: Display name
register.nameHelp: You do not need to enter your legal name.
register.terms: I agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy (required).

strength.label: Password strength
strength.tooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.

hero.socialProof: 200+ teams are building agents with Moldy
hero.loginSubtitle: Continue building your agents or start a new idea.
hero.registerSubtitle: Ready-to-use templates and tools are waiting for you.

features.security: Encrypted API keys and safe tool calls

errors.emailTaken: This email is already in use.
errors.accountLocked: Your account is temporarily locked. Try again in 15 minutes.
errors.accountInactive: This account is inactive. Contact an administrator.
errors.rateLimit: Please try again in a moment.
errors.serverError: Please try again in a moment. If the problem persists, contact an administrator.

onboarding.title: Welcome to Moldy
onboarding.subtitle: You're almost ready to build AI agents.
onboarding.body: Register an LLM API key to create AI agents.
onboarding.encryptedNote: Keys are encrypted at rest and visible only to you.

menu.label: Navigator options
menu.singleExpandedAgent: Expand one agent at a time

deleteDialog.title: Delete this conversation?
deleteDialog.description: This action cannot be undone. All messages in the conversation will be deleted.

quickSwitcher.title: Quick switch
quickSwitcher.description: Search agents and conversations to jump directly.

artifacts.title: Files
artifacts.description: Search and reopen files generated by your agents.

dashboard.subtitle: Create AI agents to automate recurring work.
dashboard.subtitleWithCount: Create AI agents to automate recurring work. You currently have {count} agents.

conversational.label: Build by Chat
conversational.description: Configure an agent through conversation with AI.

manual.label: Build Manually
manual.description: Set prompts, models, and tools yourself.

template.label: Use a Template
template.description: Start quickly from a ready-made template.

empty.title: Create your first agent
empty.description: Choose how you want to start from the cards above.

dashboard.tip: Tip: Templates help you get started faster.

hero.title: What do you want to build?
hero.subtitle: Describe it in natural language, and Moldy will suggest tools, models, and triggers step by step.

new.chatPlaceholder: Example: Search for news about my tracked keywords every morning at 8 and send it to Slack.

items.label: Daily morning news brief for tracked keywords
items.text: Every morning at 8, search for AI and semiconductor news and summarize the highlights in three lines.

items.label: Automatic GitHub PR review
items.text: When a new PR is opened, review the diff and comment on convention issues, possible bugs, and missing tests.

items.label: Competitor price monitoring
items.text: Crawl competitor product pages once a day and notify Slack when prices change.

items.label: Customer inquiry classification
items.text: Classify incoming email as refund, technical, or general inquiries, and draft replies for refunds.

items.label: Meeting notes to action items
items.text: Turn meeting notes into key decisions and action items with owners and due dates.

items.label: Nearby restaurant curation
items.text: Recommend highly rated restaurants near me by category, including hours and distance.

manual.title: Build Manually
manual.description: Configure prompts, models, and tools manually

template.subtitle: Choose a proven template and create your first agent in 30 seconds.

search.placeholder: Search by template name, description, or tool...

sort.name: Name
sort.ariaLabelNewest: Currently sorted by newest. Click to sort by name.
sort.ariaLabelName: Currently sorted by name. Click to sort by newest.

blueprints.title: Installed Agent Blueprints
blueprints.description: Use agents installed from the marketplace as reusable templates.

legacy.title: Default Templates
legacy.description: Quick-start templates that were already available in Moldy.

noSearchResults.title: No templates match "{query}"
noSearchResults.subtitle: Try another keyword or build one through conversation.

bottomCta.title: Can't find the right template?
bottomCta.subtitle: Build one through conversation or configure it from scratch.

creation.initialQuestion: What kind of agent do you want to build?
creation.initialPlaceholder: Example: "An agent that summarizes Hancom news every day"

error.sessionFailed: Could not start the build session. Please try again.
error.generic: An error occurred. Please try again.

creation.cancelDescription: Current progress will not be saved.

conversational.welcomeTitle: Create an Agent with Natural Language
conversational.welcomeDescription: Describe the agent you want in natural language. We'll build it together in eight steps: intent analysis, tool recommendations, middleware, system prompt, and image generation.
conversational.example: Example: "Create an agent that searches the web" or "Create an agent that sends stock prices every morning at 9."

settings.unsavedWarning: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to leave?
settings.title: Agent Settings: {name}
settings.name: Name

identity.title: Credential Usage
identity.description: Choose whose credentials this agent uses at runtime.

perUser.title: Per user
perUser.description: Chat runs use each caller's credentials.

fixed.title: Agent fixed
fixed.description: Scheduled runs use the owner's credentials.

apiPanel.limitsDescription: Rate and token quotas are being prepared.
apiPanel.deployDescription: Deploy this agent before issuing scoped API keys or calling it from external systems.

ineligibleReasons.fixedIdentityRequired: API deployment requires agent-fixed credential usage.

apiPanel.keysTitle: Keys that can call this agent
apiPanel.emptyKeys: Create a key from Settings > Agent API after deployment.

memory.title: Memory policy
memory.description: Choose a stricter memory policy for this agent.

toast.saveFailed: Could not save agent memory policy.

channels.hint: Configure where this agent can communicate.

scheduleCenter.description: View and manage scheduled agent runs across your workspace.

empty.description: Schedules you create from agent settings will appear here.

delete.title: Delete
delete.description: This schedule will stop running. Existing conversations and run history will remain.

conversationExport.title: Export conversation
conversationExport.description: Save this conversation to a file.
conversationExport.error: Failed to load messages. Please try again.

share.title: Share conversation
share.description: Anyone with the link can view this conversation read-only.
share.sharedHint: Anyone with the link can read this conversation without signing in. The published snapshot stays fixed even if new messages or edits are added later.
share.privateHint: This conversation is still private. Create a share link to let anyone view it read-only.

toast.createFailed: Failed to create the share link.

memory.title: Memory
memory.rejectedDescription: This was not saved to memory.

contextWindow.label: Context usage
contextWindow.disabled: This model has no configured context window (context_window), so usage can't be shown.
contextWindow.compactHint: Context is nearly full. Consider starting a new conversation or compacting.

subAgent.waiting: Sub-agent output will appear here as it streams.

rightRail.noHeadings: No headings detected in this message.

witty.0: One moment, booting up my brain...

witty.26: Drawing from the well of inspiration...

auth.oauthPopupBlocked: Browser popup was blocked. Allow popups and try again.

evaluation.emptyDescription: When the builder or Evaluation tab creates criteria, you can rerun them here.

history.empty: History starts from the current version.

detailDialog.credentialBindingsDescription: Choose the credential this skill should use when it runs. Changes apply from the next run.

systemCredentials.title: System Credentials
systemCredentials.description: Manage operator-owned credentials available to system resources.

operatorOnly.title: Operator Only
operatorOnly.description: Only super users can manage system credentials.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: No system credentials have been registered yet.

systemLlm.description: Configure the default LLMs used by system workflows.

operatorOnly.title: Operator Only
operatorOnly.description: Only super users can manage system LLM settings.

text_fallback.label: Label
text_fallback.description: Fallback model used when primary text generation fails.

skill.title: Skills
skill.description: Create and manage reusable instructions and executable skill packages.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: Add a skill to give agents reusable knowledge or workflows.

createDialog.title: New Skill
createDialog.description: Build a high-quality package skill by chat, or add a text skill or package directly.

chat.description: Describe the skill goal, example inputs, and expected output in natural language. The dedicated builder will draft files and show validation in the next step.
chat.placeholder: Example: Create a skill that turns meeting notes into a table of owners, tasks, and due dates.

scratch.description: Start with an empty text skill.
scratch.name: Name

builderDialog.descriptionCreate: Describe the job you need and Moldy will draft a package skill with validation results.
builderDialog.descriptionImprove: Start from the existing skill, review the proposed changes, and apply only after confirmation.
builderDialog.requestPlaceholder: Example: Create a skill that extracts owners, tasks, and due dates from meeting notes.
builderDialog.requestImprovePlaceholder: Example: Make due-date extraction stricter and more reliable.
builderDialog.previewEmpty: Draft files and validation status will appear here after you send a request.
builderDialog.filesEmpty: No files have been generated yet.

systemLlm.title: System LLM setup is required
systemLlm.description: Text creation and package upload are still available.
systemLlm.userDescription: The Skill Builder model needs administrator setup. Text creation and package upload are still available.
systemLlm.adminDescription: Skill Builder uses the text_primary system model. Connect a model and system credential in System LLM Settings. Text creation and package upload are still available until setup is complete.

conflict.title: Skill changed
conflict.description: The source skill changed after this improvement session started.

detailDialog.credentialsEmpty: This skill does not require credentials.

evaluation.emptyDescription: When the builder or Evaluation tab creates criteria, you can rerun them here.
evaluation.estimateDescription: Run {name} again against the current skill content.
evaluation.noRunDetail: Select a run to see detailed results.

history.empty: History starts from the current version.
history.noDetail: Select a revision to see its details.
history.rollbackCurrentDisabled: The current version cannot be rolled back.
history.rollbackDescription: Rolling back preserves the current content as a new history entry.

detailDialog.credentialBindingsDescription: Choose the credential this skill should use when it runs. Changes apply from the next run.

catalog.title: Marketplace
catalog.description: Browse agents, tools, and skills shared through the marketplace.

empty.title: No items match your filters
empty.description: Try clearing the filters or syncing the k-skill catalog (admin).

comingSoon.title: Coming soon
comingSoon.agents: The agent marketplace is planned for Phase 3.
comingSoon.mcp: The MCP marketplace is planned for Phase 2.

moderation.title: Marketplace moderation
moderation.description: Review marketplace submissions and publication status.

denied.title: Operators only
denied.description: You do not have permission to access moderation.

queueEmpty.title: No items waiting for review
queueEmpty.description: All publicly published items have been approved.

sync.cliOnly: Sync can only be run from the CLI.

error.description: The marketplace item could not be loaded.

versions.title: Versions
versions.emptyDescription: You can publish the first version from the skill detail page.

management.help: <private>Unpublish</private>: only you can see the item and new installs by other users are blocked. <disabled>Disable</disabled>: an operator block — new installs by other users are permanently blocked. In both cases, already-installed copies are not affected.

acl.title: Shared with (restricted)
acl.empty: No users have been shared yet. Adding users currently requires calling the ACL endpoint directly (a wizard is planned for a later slice).
acl.lastTargetHint: To remove the last target, change the visibility to another value first.

toast.enabled: Re-enabled — catalog exposure depends on the visibility and listing settings.
toast.unpublished: Unpublished — hidden from the catalog. Already-installed copies are not affected.
toast.lastAclRequired: A restricted item cannot drop its last ACL target. Change the visibility first.
toast.aclRequired: Switching to restricted requires at least one shared user. Add a target and try again.

visibilitySuccess.private: Switched to private. The item is no longer shown in the catalog.
visibilitySuccess.public: Switched to public. Catalog listing is pending super_user approval.
visibilitySuccess.restricted: Switched to restricted. Add ACL targets.

installWizard.title: Install {name}

toast.installedNeedsSetup: Installed {name}. Finish setup before using it.

installWizard.credentialHelp: Connect credentials required by this marketplace resource. Optional items can be skipped. Missing required credentials leave the installation in needs_setup.
installWizard.missingType: No credential of type <type></type> exists yet.
installWizard.createCredential: Create one on the Credentials page →
installWizard.requiredMissing: If you skip this, the install will be marked needs_setup.

create.skill: Create a skill owned by you (origin: imported_by_me)
create.agent: Add it to your agent blueprints
create.mcp: Add it to your MCP servers

copy.skill: Copy package files into the data directory
copy.agent: Copy agent configuration and dependency metadata into a blueprint
copy.mcp: Copy MCP server connection settings and tool snapshot

confirm.needsSetup: Marked as needs_setup — missing required credentials: {keys}
confirm.name: Name:

description.skill: Open the skill or attach it to an agent when you are ready.
description.agent: Choose this blueprint from the agent template screen to create a new agent.
description.mcp: Open the MCP server list to review settings and attach it to agents.

errors.notFound: This item could not be found or you do not have access.
errors.credentialMismatch: The selected credential does not match the requirement. Choose a different one.
errors.loadVersion: Could not load version details. Retry to set up its credentials.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please try again.

publishWizard.title: Publish {name}
publishWizard.description: Publish this resource to the marketplace.
publishWizard.reviewHint: A secret scan runs automatically before publishing. If any files are blocked, come back to step 1, remove them, and try again.
publishWizard.aclHint: Phase 1: a user lookup picker is coming in a later slice. For now, enter user UUIDs directly.
publishWizard.publicHint: Even after publishing publicly, catalog search exposure requires operator approval.
publishWizard.aclSummary: Visible to {count} selected users or groups.

errors.aclRequired: Restricted publishing requires at least one shared user.
errors.aclInvalid: Some user IDs are not valid. Enter UUIDs in 8-4-4-4-12 format.

updateStrategy.title: Update {name}
updateStrategy.dirtyWarning: ⚠ In a dirty state this option permanently deletes your direct edits.

overwrite.label: Overwrite my edits
overwrite.description: Overwrite the installed copy with the latest version and discard your direct edits. In a dirty state this loses data.

install_new_copy.label: Install as a new copy
install_new_copy.description: Keep the current install and add the latest version as a separate new skill row. You will need to manage both copies.

keep_current.label: Keep current install
keep_current.description: Do not apply the update. The install stays unchanged until the next update-available state appears.

errors.dirty: This install is dirty. Explicitly choose overwrite or install_new_copy.
errors.disabled: The source marketplace item has been disabled.
errors.network: A network error occurred. Please try again.

description.dirty: This install has direct edits. You must explicitly choose an update strategy.
description.default: Update to the latest marketplace version.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: Add a provider to register and test models.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: Add a model to make it available to agents.

model.deleteProviderWarning: {count} models from this provider will be affected.

catalog.title: Models
catalog.description: Discover models from connected providers and register them.

addDialog.title: Add Dialog
addDialog.description: Register a model and configure pricing and capabilities.

footer.title: Footer
footer.description: Build and share no-code agents with tools and skills in Moldy.

error.title: Error
error.description: The link may have expired or sharing may have been disabled. Ask the author for a new link.

appSettings.title: App Settings
appSettings.description: Manage your account and Moldy preferences.

profile.title: Profile
profile.description: Choose how Moldy and your agents display and address you.
profile.profileSettingsDescription: You can change your display name and profile icon anytime.
profile.accountInfoDescription: This information comes from your Moldy login session.
profile.name: Name
profile.displayNameHelp: You do not need to enter your legal name. Agents use this for natural address.
profile.avatarDescription: Shown in chat and the lower-left user menu.

memory.title: Memory
memory.description: Manage the long-term memory your agents can read from and write to during conversations.

policy.title: Global memory policy
policy.description: Choose the default read and write behavior for every agent.
policy.memoryEnabledHelp: When off, agents cannot read memory or save new records.
policy.memoryReadEnabledHelp: When on, active memory is included in the runtime prompt.
policy.writePolicyHelp: Decide what happens when an agent discovers something worth remembering.
policy.allowedScopesHelp: Choose whether user-wide and agent-specific memory can be stored.
policy.triggerPolicyHelp: Allow or block memory writes during scheduled trigger runs.

create.title: Add memory
create.description: Save important preferences or agent knowledge without waiting for a conversation.
create.agentHelp: This memory is used only when chatting with the selected agent.
create.userHelp: This memory is used as a user preference across all agents.
create.contentPlaceholder: e.g. I prefer meetings after 3 PM.

list.title: Recorded memories
list.description: Search, edit, or delete saved memory records.
list.emptyDescription: Approved chat memories or manually added records appear here.

placeholder.title: Security settings coming soon
placeholder.description: Password changes and session management are coming soon.
placeholder.detail: Moldy currently uses session-based authentication. Detailed security controls will be added in a later step.

theme.title: Theme
theme.description: Choose the brightness mode for the app.

language.title: Language
language.description: Choose the display language for Moldy.

agentApi.title: Agent API
agentApi.description: Deploy agents, issue server-side API keys, and call Moldy from external systems.

metrics.limitsHelper: Rate and token quotas are being prepared.

deployments.title: Deployment candidates
deployments.description: Only fixed-identity agents can be deployed to external APIs.
deployments.empty: Create an agent before deploying an API endpoint.

ineligibleReasons.fixedIdentityRequired: API deployment requires agent-fixed credential usage.

keys.title: API keys
keys.description: Keys are shown once and should only be used from server-side code.
keys.empty: Deploy an agent, then create an API key.

createDialog.title: Create API key
createDialog.description: Generate a server-side key and limit which deployed agents it can call.
createDialog.name: Name
createDialog.emptyDeployments: Deploy an agent before creating a scoped key.

createdDialog.title: API key created
createdDialog.description: This key is shown once. Store it securely on your server.

audit.title: My Activity Log
audit.description: Review changes, executions, failures, and denials tied to your account.
audit.adminDescription: Review audit events across every user in chronological order.

detail.empty: Select a record to inspect details.

bindingDialog.title: Binding Dialog
bindingDialog.description: Select the credential this PREBUILT tool should use.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Select the credential this custom tool should use.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Select the credential this MCP server should use.

prebuiltSection.title: Prebuilt Section
prebuiltSection.description: Set one default credential per provider for system tools such as Naver and Google.

prebuilt.title: Prebuilt
prebuilt.description: Manage API keys for system tools such as Naver and Google.

custom.title: Custom
custom.description: Manage API keys that custom tools can reuse.

mcp.title: MCP
mcp.description: Connect MCP servers to import additional tools. Add new servers from the Tools page.

empty.title: Empty
empty.description: Register API keys or auth details to reuse them in tools.

page.title: Credentials
page.description: Manage API keys and OAuth grants used by tools and MCP servers.

usage.subtitle: Review token usage and costs by period.

empty.title: No usage yet.
empty.description: Token usage appears here after agents run.

charts.empty: No data yet. Run an agent to populate this chart.

fallback.sectionHint: Tried in order when the primary model fails.
